scenarios.description: load() with default settings and empty .env results in Dotenv with only system environment entries (branch systemProperties=false, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary directory containing an empty .env file; no mocking needed
scenarios.expectedResult: returns a Dotenv instance whose entries() contains only System.getenv() entries; entries(Filter) returns same set

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true and no entries (branch systemProperties=true, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Create a temp dir with empty .env; no mocking needed
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv instance whose entries() contains only System.getenv(); no System.setProperty called (no new props)
pseudocode: TEST TC02 load with systemProperties empty-file

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true and single entry sets one system property (branch systemProperties=true, loop-1)
scenarios.precondition: Create .env file with one key=VAL; no mocking needed

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true and multiple entries sets all properties (branch systemProperties=true, loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: Create .env file with key1=V1;key2=V2;key3=V3; no mocking needed

scenarios.description: load() without ignoreIfMissing on missing file throws DotenvException (exception path)
scenarios.precondition: Ensure no .env in tempDir; no mocking needed
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no system property is set

scenarios.description: load() with ignoreIfMissing on missing file returns empty env (branch systemProperties=false, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Ensure no .env in tempDir; no mocking needed; builder.ignoreIfMissing()
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv with only system environment entries; no exception

scenarios.description: load() without ignoreIfMalformed on malformed file throws DotenvException (exception path)
scenarios.precondition: Create .env with malformed line `BADLINE`; no mocking

scenarios.description: load() with ignoreIfMalformed on malformed file skips bad lines (branch systemProperties=false, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Create .env with KEY=VAL and malformed `X`; builder.ignoreIfMalformed()
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv where get("KEY").equals("VAL"); malformed line ignored
